---
title: "Untitled"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document: default
date: "2025-10-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Inspect cars data

First, ...
```{r}
head(cars)
```

```{r}
summary(cars)
```

```{r}
hist(cars$speed)
```
